prompt: Minimalist app icon on pure black background. Two crab claws (pincers) curve symmetrically towards each other to form the frame of a pair of eyeglasses. The left claw curves into the left lens shape, the right claw curves into the right lens shape. They meet at a thin bridge in the center. The claws are sleek and tapered, with subtle serrated edges - clearly recognizable as crab pincers but forming elegant spectacle frames. Inside the left lens, a glowing terminal prompt symbol '>_' (greater-than sign and blinking underscore cursor). The right lens is empty. Everything drawn with thin glowing neon green (#00FF41) lines on pure black, with a soft phosphor CRT glow/bloom. Retro terminal aesthetic, like a green monochrome monitor from the 1980s. No text outside the lenses, no extra elements. Ultra minimal line art, iconic, suitable as a small mobile app icon.
